productDisplayName: Reid & Taylor Men Stripes Blue Ties
description: With a combination of light to dark blue gradation and diagonal bands with accents of purple, black and grey, this tie from Reid and Taylor is a perfect match for slim Fit dress shirts - from classic white to black and purples.Length: 150 cmMade of 100% silk for luxurious feel and light sheenHas a background of light blue to dark blue gradation in alternating wavesHas a foreground of diagonal bands with purple, grey and black accentsOne loop and brand badge on the inner of the broad tongue to hold the narrow tongue in placeTie careDry clean only
